stack: Postgres optional (transportista / omni per migrations in repo)
runtimes: Node.js (local: v24.11.1 per shell audit; CI workflows pin Node 20)
apps: Vite frontend: src/, build to dist/
Express backend: server/index.js on PORT default 3001
Optional static/dashboard paths served from API (e.g. /finanzas, /calculadora per server/index.js)
services: Google Cloud Run: API service name panelin-calc (deploy-calc-api.yml); frontend image panelin-calc-web (deploy-frontend.yml)
Vercel: vercel.json rewrites SPA (framework vite, output dist)
External: Mercado Libre API, Shopify, Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini/Grok for suggest-response
ci_cd: .github/workflows/ci.yml — validate (tests+build), lint, channels_pipeline (prod smoke), knowledge_antenna reusable
.github/workflows/deploy-calc-api.yml — Cloud Run API on server/** src/utils/** src/data/**
.github/workflows/deploy-frontend.yml — Cloud Run web image on src/** Dockerfile nginx
cursor_assets: .cursor/rules/*.mdc (9 rule files: team sync, calculator, disk recovery, human gates, devtools narrative, nav feedback, networks, spanish, video)
test_assets: tests/validation.js (~1676 lines, imports server + src + docs prototype code)
playwright in devDependencies (no evidence of committed e2e suite in this audit pass)
scripts/smoke-prod-api.mjs (production smoke, used by CI channels_pipeline)

local.status: Partially verified (commands and configs read; full stack not started in this audit session)
evidence: package.json scripts: dev :5173, start:api :3001, dev:full, gate:local:full
git status -sb on branch claude/live-calculator-editing-Beqxk (untracked .codex/, mockup png)
unknowns: Whether .env exists and which integrations are enabled on this machine
Result of npm run gate:local:full on audit date (not executed to avoid disk/build side effects)

production.status: Verified subset via npm run smoke:prod -- --json (2026-04-13)
evidence: POST /api/crm/suggest-response 200 ok (note: smoke reported provider grok)
public_base_url mismatch: capabilities manifest reports https://panelin-calc-q74zutv7dq-uc.a.run.app while smoke default base was https://panelin-calc-642127786762.us-central1.run.app
unknowns: Vercel production bundle env (VITE_API_URL / VITE_SAME_ORIGIN_API) — not readable from repo
Cloud Run revision routing if multiple services/URLs are active
WHATSAPP_APP_SECRET and webhook hardening state in prod

spec_driven_maturity.label: spec-anchored (elements of spec-validated for prod-only checks)
strengths: Canonical OpenAPI file for calculator (docs/openapi-calc.yaml) aligned with GPT/calc routes
GET /capabilities aggregates calculator + dashboard route discovery
scripts/validate-api-contracts.js exercises key JSON shapes when API is up
CI runs channels:automated which fails on prod smoke including MATRIZ CSV and suggest-response
AGENTS.md documents gates, smoke, contracts, human intervention paths
gaps: No TypeScript or JSON Schema as compile-time enforcement for API payloads
Contract tests are not default CI gate on every PR job validate (only smoke pipeline after lint+tests)
validate-api-contracts allows 503/404 as pass for several routes — masks drift
OpenAPI for full /api/dashboard surface not a single generated artifact from code
Multiple production host strings in repo (smoke default vs .env.example vs capabilities output) — authority conflict
drift_sources: DASHBOARD_ROUTES list in server/agentCapabilitiesManifest.js must be manually synced with server/routes/bmcDashboard.js
docs/openapi-calc.yaml servers.url vs actual Cloud Run hostname
AGENTS.md says never hardcode sheet IDs; server/config.js provides default BMC_MATRIZ_SHEET_ID
spec_driven_maturity.confidence: High for repository inventory; high for smoke-verified prod endpoints; medium for full prod config parity across hosts

critical_findings: capabilities.public_base_url / discovery URL disagrees with smoke script default host while both endpoints respond — operational drift risk for agents and OAuth redirects; smoke script intentionally does not fail the job on this mismatch today (see scripts/smoke-prod-api.mjs)
Production SPA API targeting: getCalcApiBase() falls back to http://localhost:3001 when VITE_API_URL and VITE_SAME_ORIGIN_API are unset in non-dev builds — misconfiguration risk on static hosts
Contract validation softness: 404 on /api/kpi-report and 503 on Sheets-backed routes can count as pass — reduces CI ability to catch regressions
Single mega-test file tests/validation.js couples domain, server libs, and docs-prototype imports — brittle for spec isolation
Node version mismatch signal: local v24 vs CI Node 20 — potential subtle runtime drift

green: Strong operational scripting culture (smoke, pre-deploy, capabilities snapshot, many npm workflows)
Security headers on API (X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options) in server/index.js
Webhook routes use raw body where needed for HMAC
yellow: Multiple deploy paths (Vercel vercel.json vs Cloud Run Docker for frontend) can confuse canonical production topology
CORS app.use(cors()) wide open — acceptable in dev; production guidance in AGENTS.md must be enforced per deploy
Secrets surface area: many API keys in .env.example documentation (placeholders) — discipline required to avoid committing real secrets
channels_pipeline depends on external prod IA + Sheets — flaky CI risk unrelated to PR diffs
red: public_base_url mismatch across documented hosts vs live smoke base (verified)
Accidental API base misconfiguration for Vercel builds could point users at localhost (logic in src/utils/calcApiBase.js)

implementation_plan.goal: Establish a single authoritative map of hosts, services, and env vars per environment (local, staging, prod).
tasks: Document canonical Cloud Run service URL(s) and reconcile PUBLIC_BASE_URL in deploy vs smoke default
Add env validation matrix (Vercel vs Cloud Run SPA) for VITE_API_URL / VITE_SAME_ORIGIN_API
Automate check: GET /capabilities discovery.public_base_url must equal SMOKE_BASE_URL when running smoke
deliverables: docs/audit/host-authority.md (new) or section in deployment checklist
Script or CI assertion for public_base_url alignment
acceptance_criteria: npm run smoke:prod passes with public_base_url ok: true without manual --base override
Zero conflicting default URLs in smoke script, openapi servers, and capabilities snapshot
dependencies: Access to Cloud Run / Vercel env configuration (human gate)
implementation_plan.risk: Low; mostly documentation and small script changes

implementation_plan.goal: Make structural contract checks fail-fast on PRs without requiring live Sheets.
tasks: Split tests/validation.js into domain vs integration modules
Add CI job: start server with mocked/minimal env OR run contract checks only against routes that do not need Sheets
Remove or narrow allow404/allow503 escape hatches; replace with explicit snapshots for degraded mode
deliverables: New test layout under tests/contract/ or tests/unit/
acceptance_criteria: PR CI fails if /calc/cotizar response shape regresses
Sheets outage simulated does not green-pass dashboard contract tests unless explicitly tagged as integration
dependencies: Refactor time; fixture strategy for Sheets
implementation_plan.risk: Medium — may expose existing flaky behaviors

implementation_plan.goal: Move toward level 3–4: generated or validated OpenAPI from route definitions.
tasks: Introduce route registry (single module) consumed by Express routers and manifest builder
Add openapi validator step comparing docs/openapi-calc.yaml to served /calc/openapi (if exists) or static build
Consider zod/express type-safe handlers for /calc/* responses
acceptance_criteria: Drift between YAML and runtime OpenAPI fails CI
GPT_ACTIONS derived from same registry as HTTP routes

implementation_plan.goal: Executable runbooks with machine-verifiable outputs (level 4+ behaviors for agent ops).
tasks: Define JSON schema for agent run reports (extend audit-summary.json pattern)
Wire channels:automated outputs to schema validation
Standardize MATPROMT bundles with acceptance hooks (lint, test, smoke)
acceptance_criteria: Invalid pipeline JSON fails CI or pre-commit
Each full team run produces attestable artifact path + hash recorded in PROJECT-STATE

implementation_plan.goal: Reduce agent context overload; parallelize high-risk work safely.
tasks: Document worktree pattern: contracts branch vs feature branch
Move long AGENTS.md tables into docs with stable anchors; keep AGENTS.md as index
Add CODEOWNERS for server/routes/bmcDashboard.js and openapi files
acceptance_criteria: Large backup JSX either linted or explicitly quarantined with rationale

recommended_next_step: Resolve Cloud Run canonical URL vs PUBLIC_BASE_URL (Phase 0) in a dedicated contracts/host-hardening branch or git worktree to avoid coupling with feature work; then tighten CI contract gates before expanding OpenAPI coverage.
